records.ety: [F. microcosme, L. microcosmus, fr. Gr. mikro`s small + ko`smos the world.]

defs: A little world; a miniature universe. Hence (so called by Paracelsus), a man, as a supposed epitome of the exterior universe or great world. Opposed to macrocosm.
A relatively small object or system considered as representative of a larger system of which it is part, exhibiting many features of the complete system.
